description_long: This is a pair of low-top athletic sneakers featuring a combination of white and green panels with black accents. The shoes have a classic silhouette with a rounded toe, perforated vamp, and white laces in a standard criss-cross pattern. The green sections have a textured, almost mossy appearance, contrasting with the smooth white areas. Branding elements are visible, including a circular emblem on the side and a logo on the tongue, as well as the text 'ARNT' on the heel tab. The outsole is black, providing a visual break from the upper, and the overall construction suggests a mix of synthetic leather and rubber materials. The shoes appear clean and structurally intact, indicating they are in new or like-new condition.
description: A pair of white and green low-top sneakers with black accents, featuring branding on the tongue, side, and heel. The shoes have a classic athletic design with white laces and a black outsole.
description_view_0: Front view showing the rounded toe, white laces, and logo on the tongue.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the green and white color blocking, circular side emblem, and black outsole.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the 'ARNT' branding on the heel tab and the green heel panel.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, with visible side emblem and color contrast.
attribute_logo: Circular emblem on the side, stylized logo on the tongue, 'ARNT' text on the heel tab; all in white or black.
